ab: Walis Pawan ka ngayan mu yaku.
Pawan Dakis ka ngayan na tama mu.
en: My dad’s name is Pawan Dakis.

ab: Robo Walis ka ngayan na bubu mu.
en: My mother’s name is Robo Walis.

ab: Maxal ka knkawas mu saya di.
Niqan ku kingal qbsuran rseno ka yaku, Takun ka ngayan na, maxal kingal ka knkawas na saya di.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Takun，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Takun, he is 11 years old.

ab: Ga miyan suupu muuyas kingal sapah pyasan.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: Smkuxul nami muuyas uyas kana miyan ka qbsuran mu rseno.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: Smkuxul ku lmanguy ka yaku, mgduru de mosa nami lmanguy kana ka tnsapah mu.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: Smkuxul ku mgkela dangi bgurah ka yaku, suupu miyan mosa muuyas uyas ma lmanguy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
